proofStatusNote: All 19 structured attackEvidence cases were rejected with expected errors, account mutation checks passed, and counter-attested verifier flags are true.

cases.title: Merchant-only fake receipt
cases.normalReferralFailure: An admin can mark a conversion manually.
cases.viralSyncDefense: Receipt requires enrolled terminal + visitor signer + merchant authority.
cases.actualError:
Signature verification failed.
Missing signature for public key(s) [`8fPxj9YJZQrWnK9jRbR4wUPnrMj5a8Zi3h8doLwCXbei`, `DdrATNwsqENiAnbT4jbCuL3CDYYLJpZasNgTf9HB14sj`].

cases.title: Wrong terminal signer
cases.normalReferralFailure: Anyone with staff access can approve a fake code.
cases.viralSyncDefense: Terminal signer must match the enrolled terminal PDA.

cases.title: Child claim pass with forged parent receipt hash
cases.normalReferralFailure: A referral tree can point at one parent receipt while committing another parent hash.
cases.viralSyncDefense: Child claim passes must supply the actual settled parent receipt account and matching parent receipt hash.

cases.title: Inflated reward amount
cases.normalReferralFailure: Backend bugs can overpay a reward.
cases.viralSyncDefense: Receipt intent validates reward against manifest cap.

cases.title: Inflated referrer split bps
cases.normalReferralFailure: A backend can silently change payout split before settlement.
cases.viralSyncDefense: Settlement terms are locked to the intent/campaign split.
cases.actualError: IntentMismatch: referrer split does not match manifest.
cases.evidence: IntentMismatch: referrer split does not match manifest.
